RuleSet.Name: Top
RuleSet.Descr: Top level rules for creating Java 25 files
RuleSet.GenRule: $switch CodeVis Public ExplainCodeVisPublic Protected ExplainCodeVisProtected default ExplainCodeVisPrivate$
CodeVis Public, meaning that any user interface or referencing schema can access it
CodeVis Protected, meaning that any only user interfaces and application code specific to the defining schema can access it
CodeVis Private, meaning that only the back-end code for the schema implementation can access it, and even the code specific user interface cannot
$iterate SchemaDef( each schemaPubFiles )$$iterate SchemaDef( each schemaProtFiles )$$iterate SchemaDef( each schemaFiles )$

$validatePageData$$fileSchemaJavaPubGitIgnore$$fileSchemaJavaPubPomXml$$fileSchemaPubISchemaJava$$iterate SchemaRefs( each empty empty fileISchemaPubAuthorizationJava )$$iterate SchemaRefs( each empty empty fileISchemaPubAuthorizationCallbackJava )$$iterate SchemaRefs( each empty empty fileSchemaPubAuthorizationJava )$$iterate SchemaRefs( empty fileISchemaPubSecurityServiceJava each empty )$$iterate SchemaRefs( each empty empty fileSchemaPubTableDataJava )$$iterate SchemaRefs( each empty empty fileSchemaPubRoleInfoJava )$$iterate SchemaRefs( each empty empty fileSchemaPubRoleInfoDependencyComparatorJava )$$iterate DefSchemaPublicTables( each tablePubFiles empty empty )$

$fileSchemaJavaProtGitIgnore$$fileSchemaProtJavaPomXml$$iterate SchemaRefs( each empty empty fileISchemaProtAuthorizationJava )$$iterate SchemaRefs( each empty empty fileISchemaProtAuthorizationCallbackJava )$$iterate SchemaRefs( each empty empty fileSchemaProtAuthorizationJava )$$iterate SchemaRefs( empty fileISchemaProtSecurityServiceJava each empty )$$iterate SchemaRefs( empty fileISchemaProtSecurityControlJava each empty )$$iterate DefSchemaProtectedTables( each tableProtFiles empty empty )$

$validatePageData$$fileSchemaJavaGitIgnore$$fileSchemaBinGitIgnore$$fileSchemaCoreGitIgnore$$fileSchemaJavaPomXml$$fileSchemaJavaJpaPomXml$$fileResourcesApplicationProperties$$fileResourcesUserDefaultProperties$$fileResourcesMetaInfPersistenceXml$$fileSchemaRamGitIgnore$$fileSchemaJavaRamPomXml$$fileSchemaISchemaJava$$fileSchemaISchemaFactoryJava$$fileSchemaJpaFactoryServiceJava$$fileSchemaBuffFactoryServiceJava$$fileSchemaJpaConfigJava$$fileSchemaJpaSchemaJava$$iterate SchemaRefs( empty fileSchemaJpaSecurityCacheJava each empty )$$fileSchemaBuffHooksSchemaJava$$fileSchemaJpaHooksSchemaJava$$fileSchemaBuffSchemaJava$$iterate SchemaRefs( each empty empty fileISchemaAuthorizationJava )$$iterate SchemaRefs( each empty empty fileISchemaAuthorizationCallbackJava )$$iterate SchemaRefs( each empty empty fileSchemaAuthorizationJava )$$iterate SchemaRefs( empty fileISchemaSecurityControlJava each empty )$$iterate SchemaRefs( empty fileISchemaSecurityServiceJava each empty )$$iterate SchemaRefs( empty fileSchemaSecurityCacheJava each empty )$$fileSchemaBuffHooksSchemaJava$$fileISchemaSchemaObjJava$$fileSchemaSchemaObjJava$$fileSchemaITablePermsJava$$fileSchemaJavaJpaGitIgnore$$fileSchemaJavaJpaTestGitIgnore$$fileSchemaJavaJpaTestPomXml$$fileSchemaJpaTestJava$$fileSchemaJpaTestEnProperties$$fileSchemaJpaTestPropnamesTxt$$fileSchemaJpaTestApplicationProperties$$fileResourcesJpaTestUserDefaultProperties$$fileSchemaJpaTestStartupListenerJava$$fileSchemaJavaRamTestGitIgnore$$fileSchemaJavaRamTestPomXml$$fileSchemaRamTestJava$$fileSchemaRamTestEnProperties$$fileSchemaRamTestPropnamesTxt$$fileSchemaRamTestApplicationProperties$$fileResourcesRamTestUserDefaultProperties$$fileSchemaRamTestStartupListenerJava$$fileSchemaJavaAppSetupGitIgnore$$fileSchemaJavaAppSetupPomXml$$fileSchemaAppSetupJava$$fileSchemaAppSetupFxApplicationJava$$fileSchemaJpaIdGenServiceJava$$fileSchemaJpaSchemaServiceJava$$iterate SchemaRefs( each fileSchemaJpaTestTestSchemaJava empty empty )$$fileSchemaJpaTestTestSchemaJava$$iterate SchemaRefs( each fileSchemaRamTestTestSchemaJava empty empty )$$fileSchemaRamTestTestSchemaJava$$fileSchemaJpaTestConfigurationJava$$fileSchemaRamTestConfigurationJava$$fileSchemaRamSchemaJava$$iterate SchemaTables( each tableFiles empty empty )$
$switch HasDefSchema yes empty default tablePubFilesNoDefSchema$$fileISchemaPubTableObjJava$$fileIPubObjJava$$fileIPubEditObjJava$$iterate Index( each indexPubFiles )$

$switch HasDefSchema yes empty default tableFilesNoDefSchema$$fileISchemaTableObjJava$$fileIObjJava$$fileIEditObjJava$$fileSchemaTableObjJava$$fileObjJava$$fileEditObjJava$$fileSchemaRamTableTableJava$$iterate Index( each indexFiles )$

$fileISchemaPubTableTableJava$$fileISchemaPubTableFactoryJava$$switch HasSuperClassRelation yes empty default fileISchemaPubTablePKeyJava$$fileISchemaPubTableJava$$iterate Index( each fileISchemaPubTableIndexKeyJava empty empty )$$tablePubHFiles$$iterate Index( each indexPubFilesNoDefSchema empty empty )$$fileISchemaPubTableObjJava$$fileIPubObjJava$$fileIPubEditObjJava$

$fileISchemaProtTableTableJava$$fileSchemaProtBuffTableTableJava$$fileISchemaProtTableFactoryJava$$fileSchemaProtBuffTableFactoryServiceJava$$switch HasSuperClassRelation yes empty default fileISchemaProtTablePKeyJava$$fileISchemaProtTableJava$$iterate Index( each fileISchemaProtTableIndexKeyJava )$$fileISchemaProtTableTableJava$$tableProtHFiles$$switch HasSuperClassRelation yes empty default fileSchemaProtBuffTablePKeyJava$$switch HasSuperClassRelation yes empty default maybeFileSchemaProtBuffTableHPKeyJava$$fileSchemaProtBuffTableJava$$fileSchemaProtBuffTableHJava$$iterate Index( each indexProtFilesNoDefSchema empty empty )$$fileISchemaProtTableObjJava$$fileISchemaProtTableEditObjJava$$fileSchemaProtTableObjJava$$fileSchemaProtTableEditObj$

$fileISchemaTableTableJava$$fileSchemaJpaTableTableJava$$fileSchemaBuffTableTableJava$$fileISchemaTableFactoryJava$$fileSchemaJpaTableFactoryServiceJava$$fileSchemaBuffTableFactoryServiceJava$$switch HasSuperClassRelation yes empty default fileISchemaTablePKeyJava$$fileISchemaTableJava$$iterate Index( each fileISchemaTableIndexKeyJava )$$fileISchemaTableTableJava$$tableHFiles$$switch HasSuperClassRelation yes empty default fileSchemaJpaTablePKeyJava$$switch HasSuperClassRelation yes empty default maybeFileSchemaJpaTableHPKeyJava$$fileSchemaJpaTableJava$$fileSchemaJpaTableHJava$$switch HasSuperClassRelation yes empty default fileSchemaBuffTablePKeyJava$$switch HasSuperClassRelation yes empty default maybeFileSchemaBuffTableHPKeyJava$$fileSchemaBuffTableJava$$fileSchemaBuffTableHJava$$iterate Index( each indexFilesNoDefSchema empty empty )$$fileSchemaJpaTableRepositoryJava$$fileSchemaJpaTableServiceJava$$fileISchemaTableObjJava$$fileISchemaTableEditObjJava$$fileSchemaTableObjJava$$fileSchemaTableEditObj$
$switch IsPrimaryIndex no fileSchemaJpaTableIndexKeyJava default empty$$switch IsPrimaryIndex no fileSchemaBuffTableIndexKeyJava default empty$
$switch ContainerStyleInternal Single ContainerStyleSingle None ContainerStyleNone empty ContainerStyleMultiple default ContainerStyleMultiple$
$iterate ContainerRelations( lone ContainerStyleSingle empty SuperOrContainerStyleNone each ContainerStyleYada )$
$popto Table reference SuperClassRelation reference ToTable ContainerStyleInternal$
